subject: Gaming
title: Africa's Emerging Gaming Scene
description: A short lesson to help you apply Africa's Emerging Gaming Scene.

hook.text: Africa's gaming market is the fastest-growing in the world. A continent of 1.4 billion people is just starting to play.

buildup.text: Smartphone adoption is exploding across Africa. Mobile gaming is the entry point for hundreds of millions.

discovery.text: Studios in Nigeria, Kenya, and South Africa are creating games with African stories and cultural themes.

twist.text: Infrastructure challenges—power outages, expensive data, limited payment options—create unique barriers.

climax.text: Africa represents gaming's biggest untapped market. The next billion gamers may come from this continent.

punchline.text: The next billion gamers. Africa's gaming revolution is just beginning.

quiz.question: Why is Africa considered gaming's biggest untapped market?
options: 1.4 billion people with rapidly growing smartphone adoption
It has the most gaming consoles
Africa already has the most gamers
